StepAction: Store has 無 項目 供 this sid; reducer waiting 供 first Session-scoped SSE 事件. Once first 事件 arrives, reducer creates 項目 使用 已收到於 = Date.now() 與 transitions 到 Fresh.

項目 exists; fidelity = fresh. Any further Session-scoped 事件 供 this sid continuously refreshes 已收到於 = Date.now() 透過 reducer (步驟-internal side effect, 無 transition). UI memo renders normally 不 stale hint.
項目 exists but soft threshold exceeded; fidelity = stale. UI memo renders 'updated N ago' badge while still showing content. Either 事件 arrival rolls 回到 到 Fresh, 或 hard threshold advances 到 HardStale.
Hard threshold exceeded; fidelity = hard-stale. UI memo degrades 渲染: card grayed / collapsed / elapsed timer frozen. 僅 事件 arrival 返回 到 Fresh.
